Joint Circular No. 01/2024/TTLT-VKSNDTC-BCA-BQP-BNN&PTNT-BTC annulling Joint Circular No. 03/TTLN dated 15/5/1992 of the Supreme People's Procuracy, Ministry of Home Affairs, Ministry of National Defense, Ministry of Forestry and General Department of Customs guiding the implementation of the provisions of the Criminal Procedure Code on the receipt and settlement of crime reports and accusations.
Joint Circular
MINISTRY OF AGRICULTURE AND RURAL DEVELOPMENT - MINISTRY OF PUBLIC SECURITY - MINISTRY OF NATIONAL DEFENSE - MINISTRY OF FINANCE
12/04/2024
09/05/2024
Official Gazette No. 1265 + 1266 dated 2024-11-20
annulling Joint Circular No. 03/TTLN dated 15/5/1992 of the Supreme People's Procuracy, Ministry of Home Affairs, Ministry of National Defense, Ministry of Forestry and General Department of Customs guiding the implementation of the provisions of the Criminal Procedure Code on the receipt and settlement of crime reports and accusations.
Senior Lieutenant General Vo Minh Luong - Nguyen Duy Giang - Lieutenant General Le Quoc Hung - NGUYEN DUC CHI - NGUYEN HOANG HIEP

SUPREME PEOPLE'S PROCURACY - MINISTRY OF PUBLIC SECURITY - MINISTRY OF NATIONAL DEFENSE - MINISTRY OF AGRICULTURE AND RURAL DEVELOPMENT - MINISTRY OF FINANCE
SUPREME PEOPLE'S PROCURACY - MINISTRY OF PUBLIC SECURITY - MINISTRY OF NATIONAL DEFENSE - MINISTRY OF AGRICULTURE AND RURAL DEVELOPMENT - MINISTRY OF FINANCE
No: 01/2024/TTLT-VKSNDTC-BCA-
BQP- BNN&PTNT-BTC
SOCIALIST REPUBLIC OF VIETNAM
Independence - Freedom - Happiness
Hanoi, 12th April 2024
JOINT CIRCULAR
Annuling Joint Circular No. 03/TTLN dated 15/5/1992 of the Supreme People's Procuracy, Ministry of Home Affairs, Ministry of National Defense, Ministry of Forestry and General Department of Customs guiding the implementation of the provisions of the Criminal Procedure Code on the
receipt and settlement of crime reports and accusations
Pursuant to the Criminal Procedure Code dated 27 November 2015; Law amending and supplementing a number of articles of the Criminal Procedure Code dated 12 November 2021;
Pursuant to the Law on Promulgation of Legal Documents dated 22 June 2015; Law amending and supplementing a number of articles of the Law on Promulgation of Legal Documents dated 18 June 2020;
The Chief Procurator of the Supreme People's Procuracy, the Minister of Public Security, the Minister of National Defense, the Minister of Agriculture and Rural Development, and the Minister of Finance promulgate the Joint Circular annulling Joint Circular No. 03/TTLN dated 15/5/1992 of the Supreme People's Procuracy, Ministry of Home Affairs (now Ministry of Public Security), Ministry of National Defense, Ministry of Forestry (now under Ministry of Agriculture and Rural Development) and General Department of Customs (now under Ministry of Finance) guiding the implementation of the provisions of the Criminal Procedure Code on the receipt and settlement of crime reports and accusations.
Article 1. Complete annulment of legal documents
Complete annulment of Joint Circular No. 03/TTLN dated 15/5/1992 of the Supreme People's Procuracy, Ministry of Home Affairs, Ministry of National Defense, Ministry of Forestry and General Department of Customs guiding the implementation of the provisions of the Criminal Procedure Code on the receipt and settlement of crime reports and accusations.
Article 2. Implementation provisions
1. This Circular takes effect from 09 May 2024.
2. The Supreme People's Procuracy, Ministry of Public Security, Ministry of National Defense, Ministry of Agriculture and Rural Development, Ministry of Finance and relevant agencies, organizations, and individuals are responsible for implementing this Joint Circular./.
KT. MINISTER OF NATIONAL DEFENSE
DEPUTY MINISTER
Senior Lieutenant General Vo Minh Luong
KT. CHIEF PROCURATOR
SUPREME PEOPLE'S PROCURACY
DEPUTY CHIEF PROCURATOR
Nguyen Duy Giang
KT. MINISTER OF PUBLIC SECURITY
DEPUTY MINISTER
Lieutenant General Le Quoc Hung
KT. MINISTER OF FINANCE
DEPUTY MINISTER
Nguyen Duc Chi
KT. MINISTER
MINISTRY OF AGRICULTURE & RURAL DEVELOPMENT
DEPUTY MINISTER
Nguyen Hoang Hiep

paragraphs: SUPREME PEOPLE'S PROCURACY - MINISTRY OF PUBLIC SECURITY - MINISTRY OF NATIONAL DEFENSE - MINISTRY OF AGRICULTURE AND
MINISTRY OF PUBLIC SECURITY - MINISTRY OF NATIONAL DEFENSE -

Abolishing Joint Circular No. 03/TTLN dated May 15, 1992, of the Supreme People's Procuracy, Ministry of Interior, Ministry of National Defense, Ministry of Forestry, and the General Department of Customs guiding the implementation of the provisions of the Criminal Procedure Code regarding
the reception and resolution of accusations and crime reports
Based on the Criminal Procedure Code dated November 27, 2015; Law amending and supplementing certain provisions of the Criminal Procedure Code dated November 12, 2021;
Based on the Law on Promulgation of Legal Documents dated June 22, 2015; Law amending and supplementing certain provisions of the Law on Promulgation of Legal Documents dated June 18, 2020;

The Prosecutor General of the Supreme People's Procuracy, the Minister of Public Security, the Minister of National Defense, the Minister of Agriculture and Rural Development, and the Minister of Finance issue this Joint Circular abolishing Joint Circular No. 03/TTLN dated May 15, 1992, of the Supreme People's Procuracy, Ministry of Interior (now Ministry of Public Security), Ministry of National Defense, Ministry of Forestry (now under the Ministry of Agriculture and Rural Development), and the General Department of Customs (now under the Ministry of Finance) guiding the implementation of the provisions of the Criminal Procedure Code regarding the reception and resolution of accusations and crime reports.
Article 1. Abolish the entire legal document

Complete repeal of Inter-sectoral Circular No. 03/TTLN dated 15/5/1992 by the Supreme People's Procuracy, the Ministry of Home Affairs, the Ministry of Defense, the Ministry of Forestry, and the General Department of Customs guiding the implementation of the provisions of the Criminal Procedure Law on receiving and handling crime reports and denunciations.
1. This Circular takes effect from May 9, 2024.

2. The Supreme People's Procuracy, the Ministry of Public Security, the Ministry of Defense, the Ministry of Agriculture and Rural Development, the Ministry of Finance and related agencies, organizations, and individuals are responsible for implementing this Joint Circular.
Senior Lieutenant General Vo Minh Luong
ON BEHALF OF THE MINISTER OF FINANCE
content.text:
SUPREME PEOPLE'S PROCURACY - MINISTRY OF PUBLIC SECURITY - MINISTRY OF NATIONAL DEFENSE - MINISTRY OF AGRICULTURE AND RURAL DEVELOPMENT - MINISTRY OF FINANCE

SUPREME PEOPLE'S PROCURACY -

MINISTRY OF PUBLIC SECURITY - MINISTRY OF NATIONAL DEFENSE - MINISTRY OF AGRICULTURE AND RURAL DEVELOPMENT - MINISTRY OF FINANCE

Number: 01/2024/TTLT-VKSNDTC-BCA-BQP-BNN&PTNT-BTC

SOCIALIST REPUBLIC OF VIETNAM

Independence - Freedom - Happiness

Hanoi, April 12, 2024

INTER-CIRCULAR

Repealing Inter-agency Circular No. 03/TTLN dated May 15, 1992, of the Supreme People's Procuracy, the Ministry of the Interior, the Ministry of National Defense, the Ministry of Forestry, and the General Department of Customs guiding the implementation of the provisions of the Criminal Procedure Code on

receiving, resolving crime reports and denouncements

Pursuant to the Criminal Procedure Code dated November 27, 2015; Law amending and supplementing a number of articles of the Criminal Procedure Code dated November 12, 2021;

Pursuant to the Law on Promulgation of Legal Normative Documents dated June 22, 2015; Law amending and supplementing a number of articles of the Law on Promulgation of Legal Normative Documents dated June 18, 2020;

The Chief Procurator of the Supreme People's Procuracy, the Minister of Public Security, the Minister of National Defense, the Minister of Agriculture and Rural Development, the Minister of Finance promulgates this Inter-circular to repeal the Inter-agency Circular No. 03/TTLN dated May 15, 1992, of the Supreme People's Procuracy, the Ministry of the Interior (now the Ministry of Public Security), the Ministry of National Defense, the Ministry of Forestry (now part of the Ministry of Agriculture and Rural Development) and the General Department of Customs (now part of the Ministry of Finance) guiding the implementation of the provisions of the Criminal Procedure Code on receiving, resolving crime reports and denouncements.

Article 1: Repeal of Entire Legal Normative Document

Repealing the entire Inter-agency Circular No. 03/TTLN dated May 15, 1992, of the Supreme People's Procuracy, the Ministry of the Interior, the Ministry of National Defense, the Ministry of Forestry, and the General Department of Customs guiding the implementation of the provisions of the Criminal Procedure Code on receiving, resolving crime reports and denouncements.

Article 2: Implementation Terms

1. This Circular takes effect from May 9, 2024.

2. The Supreme People's Procuracy, the Ministry of Public Security, the Ministry of National Defense, the Ministry of Agriculture and Rural Development, the Ministry of Finance, and relevant agencies, organizations, and individuals are responsible for the implementation of this Inter-circular.

ON BEHALF OF THE MINISTER OF NATIONAL DEFENSE

DEPUTY MINISTER

Colonel-General Võ Minh Lương

ON BEHALF OF THE CHIEF PROCURATOR

SUPREME PEOPLE'S PROCURACY

DEPUTY CHIEF PROCURATOR

Nguyễn Duy Giảng
